source_title: DOW-UAP-D23, Mission Report, United Arab Emirates, October 2023
description_blurb:
This document is a Mission Report (MISREP), a standardized reporting form the U.S. Military uses to record the circumstances surrounding its operations. U.S. military services often use MISREPs to report Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) to AARO. The GENTEXT, or “general text” section of these reports often contains important qualitative, contextual information, distinguishing it from the more quantitative, or numerical, data found elsewhere in the report.
A U.S. military operator reported observing one UAP.
All descriptive and estimative language contained in this report reflects the reporter’s subjective interpretation at the time of the event. Such characterizations should not be interpreted as a conclusive indication of the presence or absence of any intrinsic object features or performance characteristics.
title: DOW-UAP-D23, Mission Report, United Arab Emirates, October 2023
summary: This document is a Mission Report (MISREP) from the Department of War, submitted on October 31, 2023, detailing operations in the Persian Gulf. A U.S. military operator reported observing two Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) incidents on October 24, 2023, during an ISR mission. The first UAP was observed at 0241Z, showing a cold thermal signature and an estimated velocity of 320 MPH. The second UAP was observed at 0322Z, with an estimated velocity of 440 MPH. Both UAPs were assessed as benign and not under intelligent control. No maneuverability observations or effects on persons or equipment were noted. The report emphasizes that descriptive language reflects the reporter's subjective interpretation.
reported_behavior: No maneuverability observed; response to observer actions unknown. Physical state solid. First UAP showed a cold thermal signature with an estimated velocity of 320 MPH. Second UAP had an estimated velocity of 440 MPH. Both were assessed as not under intelligent control.
official_resolution: All descriptive and estimative language contained in this report reflects the reporter’s subjective interpretation at the time of the event. Such characterizations should not be interpreted as a conclusive indication of the presence or absence of any intrinsic object features or performance characteristics.
bust_reasoning: The document explicitly states the UAPs were 'not under intelligent control' and showed 'no maneuverability,' which strongly points towards a prosaic explanation. The velocities (320-440 MPH) are within the range of conventional atmospheric objects, and the accuracy is 'estimated.' The 'cold thermal signature' is unusual but consistent with objects at high altitude or those not generating significant heat (e.g., balloons, certain types of debris). The lack of any descriptive details despite multi-sensor modalities suggests the objects were indistinct or too far to resolve, further supporting a mundane interpretation.
full_text:
# DOW-UAP-D23, Mission Report, United Arab Emirates, October 2023 - Page 1 [SECRET//NOFORN] Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison USCENTCOM Chief of Staff Declassified on: 12 September 2025 [redacted] Privacy Act applies # Misrep undefined-9319618 ## Narrative (SECRET//NOFORN) (SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY) AT 0015Z, [1.4a] TOOK OFF FROM AL DHAFRA (OMAM). (SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY) AT 0030Z, [1.4a] HANDED OVER FROM THE LRE. (SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY) AT 0145Z, [1.4a] RECEIVED A PROFESSIONAL GUARD CALL. SEE GUARD CALL LINE 1. (SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY) FROM 0150Z TO 2019Z, [1.4a] COLLECTED SIGINT VIA AIRHANDLER. (SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY) AT 0155Z, [1.4a] WAS ON STATION IN SRO TRACK IRISH SICKLE. (SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY) FROM 0155Z TO 1837Z, [1.4a] CONDUCTED IMINT ISO OP SPARTAN SHIELD (OP [1.4a]) SEE ISR LINE 1. (SECRET//NOFORN) AT 0241Z, [1.4a] OBSERVED 1X UAP. SEE UAP LINE 1. (SECRET//NOFORN) AT 0322Z, [1.4a] OBSERVED 1X UAP. SEE UAP LINE 2. (SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY) AT 1837Z, [1.4a] WAS CLEARED TO RTB. (SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY) AT 1912Z, [1.4a] WAS OFF STATION. (SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY) AT 2019Z, [1.4a] HANDED BACK TO THE LRE. (SECRET//REL TO USA, FVEY) AT 2058Z, [1.4a] LANDED AT OMAM. FMV WAS EXPLOITED BY DGS-2. (SECRET//NOFORN) (S/RELIDO) Mission Narrative | 3.5c, (b)(6) | | :--- | [SECRET//NOFORN] USCENTCOM MDR 25-0104 Approved for Release to AARO - [redacted] 09/12/25 000001 # DOW-UAP-D23, Mission Report, United Arab Emirates, October 2023 - Page 2
~~SECRET//NOFORN~~
Declassified by MG Richard A. Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Declassified on: 12 September 2025
~~FOUO / Privacy Act applies~~

cover_up_reasoning: While the document has been declassified and approved for release to AARO, indicating a degree of transparency, the specific 'UAP Event Description' within the GENTEXT/UAP sections is heavily redacted. This redaction of the narrative details of the UAP observation goes beyond routine operational security or privacy concerns, hindering a complete understanding of the reported incidents.
title_zh: DOW-UAP-D23，任务报告，阿拉伯联合酋长国，2023年10月
summary_zh: 本文件为一份任务报告 (MISREP)，由美国战争部于2023年10月31日提交，详细说明了在波斯湾的行动。一名美国军事操作员报告称，在2023年10月24日的一次ISR任务期间，观察到两起不明异常现象 (UAP) 事件。第一个UAP于0241Z被观察到，呈现出低温热特征，估计速度为320英里/小时。第二个UAP于0322Z被观察到，估计速度为440英里/小时。两个UAP均被评估为无害且不受智能控制。未观察到机动性，亦未发现对人员或设备产生影响。报告强调，描述性语言反映了报告员的主观解读。
reported_behavior_zh: 未观察到机动性；对观察者行动的反应未知。物理状态为固态。第一个UAP呈现低温热特征，估计速度为320英里/小时。第二个UAP估计速度为440英里/小时。两者均被评估为不受智能控制。
official_resolution_zh: 本报告中包含的所有描述性和估计性语言，均反映了报告员在事件发生时的主观解读。此类描述不应被解读为确凿的证据，表明任何固有物体特征或性能特性的存在或缺失。
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件明确指出UAP“不受智能控制”且“未观察到机动性”，这强烈指向一种平淡无奇的解释。速度（320-440英里/小时）在常规大气物体的范围内，且准确性为“估计”。“低温热特征”虽然不寻常，但与高空物体或不产生显著热量的物体（例如气球、某些类型的碎片）相符。尽管采用了多传感器模式，但缺乏任何描述性细节，这表明物体不清晰或距离太远无法分辨，进一步支持了世俗的解释。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 尽管该文件已解密并获准向AARO发布，表明了一定程度的透明度，但GENTEXT/UAP部分中的具体“UAP事件描述”被大量删节。对UAP观测叙述细节的这种删节超出了常规行动安全或隐私考虑的范畴，阻碍了对所报告事件的全面理解。
claims: A U.S. military operator observed two UAPs.
First UAP had a cold thermal signature and an estimated velocity of 320 MPH.
Second UAP had an estimated velocity of 440 MPH.
Both UAPs were assessed as benign.
Both UAPs were assessed as not under intelligent control.
claims_zh: 一名美国军事操作员观察到两个UAP。
第一个UAP呈现低温热特征，估计速度为320英里/小时。
第二个UAP估计速度为440英里/小时。
两个UAP均被评估为不受智能控制。
bust_explanations: High-altitude balloon or similar atmospheric research/surveillance platform. This fits the 'cold thermal signature' (ambient temperature at altitude), 'solid physical state', 'not under intelligent control', and 'no maneuverability observed'. The estimated velocities (320-440 MPH) are high for typical weather balloons but plausible for larger, purpose-built high-altitude platforms or debris caught in strong jet stream winds, especially given the 'estimated' accuracy.

Space debris or satellite. A piece of space debris or a defunct satellite could be 'solid', 'not under intelligent control', and appear 'cold' if it's not generating its own heat and is reflecting ambient light/IR. The estimated velocities, while low for orbital speeds, could be plausible for re-entry or specific observation geometries.

Unidentified atmospheric object (e.g., large drone, specific type of unpowered glider). While less likely given the 'cold thermal signature' for most powered drones, a non-emitting, solid object at high altitude, not exhibiting intelligent control or maneuverability, could fit the description, especially if it's a passive or stealthy platform.
bust_explanations_zh: 高空探测气球或类似的大气研究/监视平台。这符合“低温热特征”（高空环境温度）、“固态物理状态”、“不受智能控制”和“未观察到机动性”。估计速度（320-440英里/小时）对于典型气象气球而言较高，但对于大型、专用高空平台或被强劲急流风捕获的碎片而言是合理的，特别是考虑到“估计”的准确性。
空间碎片或卫星。一块空间碎片或一颗废弃卫星可能是“固态”、“不受智能控制”，并且如果它不产生自身热量并反射环境光/红外线，则可能显得“低温”。估计速度虽然低于轨道速度，但对于再入或特定观测几何形状而言可能是合理的。
不明大气物体（例如，大型无人机、特定类型的无动力滑翔机）。尽管考虑到大多数动力无人机的“低温热特征”可能性较小，但一个在高空、不发光、固态、不表现出智能控制或机动性的物体可能符合描述，特别是如果它是一个被动或隐形平台。
cover_up_indicators: The 'UAP Event Description' in the GENTEXT/UAP sections is heavily redacted.
Specific coordinates and links to ISR products are redacted.
Personnel names, ranks, units, phone numbers, and emails are redacted.
Aircraft callsigns and tail numbers are redacted.
cover_up_indicators_zh: GENTEXT/UAP部分中的“UAP事件描述”被大量删节。
具体坐标和ISR产品链接被删节。
人员姓名、军衔、单位、电话号码和电子邮件被删节。
飞机呼号和尾号被删节。
